name: GeoSmarty
description: GeoSmarty – Fun Geography Quiz for Kids! Get ready to explore the world with GeoSmarty, an exciting geography quiz game designed especially for kids! In this fun and educational game, players answer 20 engaging geography questions that challenge their knowledge about countries, continents, landmarks, maps, and the amazing planet we live on. Whether you’re learning about famous places, identifying locations on the globe, or discovering interesting facts about the world, GeoSmarty makes learning geography interactive, colorful, and enjoyable.
